metadata.review_only_rule: resolved repair lanes stay non-countable until a separate countable import, local-evidence check, and label-factory gate explicitly accept them

reaction_substrate_decision.rationale: glucokinase / hexokinase IV (EC 2.7.1.2): ASKHA/hexokinase-fold sugar kinase. ATP gamma-phosphoryl transfer to glucose 6-OH. Pocket Mg2+ is ATP cofactor. Out_of_scope confirmed; future fingerprint family: ASKHA / hexokinase.

reaction_substrate_decision.rationale: acetate kinase / AckA (EC 2.7.2.1): ASKHA-fold kinase; ATP gamma-phosphoryl transfer to acetate carboxylate to form acetyl phosphate. Not a hydrolase. Should be labeled out_of_scope; future fingerprint family: ASKHA.

rows.resolution_policy: external reaction/substrate review can close the local-evidence repair lane as review-only debt, but this artifact never promotes labels or makes rows countable

reaction_substrate_decision.rationale: CDP-ME kinase / IspE (EC 2.7.1.148): GHMP-superfamily kinase; ATP gamma-phosphoryl transfer to CDP-ME. Not a hydrolase. Should be labeled out_of_scope; future fingerprint family: GHMP kinase.

reaction_substrate_decision.rationale: phosphatidylinositol-5-phosphate 4-kinase / PIP5K (EC 2.7.1.149): atypical PK-fold lipid kinase, related to ePK. ATP gamma-phosphoryl transfer to PI-5-P. Should be labeled out_of_scope; future fingerprint family: ePK (PIP-kinase subclass).
